title: Time Limit
description: You have [blue]3[/blue] more turns to defeat the Battleworn Dummy.
smart_description: You have [blue]3[/blue] more turns to defeat the Battleworn Dummy.
notes: Starts at 3 and decreases by 1 at the end of each player turn. When the counter reaches 0, the player is forced to escape the combat, marking that they ran out of time.
